content.en:
Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian used the Escape Card to shuttle over, and instantly crossed the long territory and came here.

The six Eternal Realm God Realm were not too surprised to see Ye Tian coming, but at least one Eternal Realm God Realm came, and maybe they would come to the Eternal Realm God Realm later, and then they would be able to compete with this group of demon species.

"So many demon seeds!"

Ye Tian showed a look of surprise, and immediately said, "You guys stand down, leave it to me here!"

He's going to kill them all!

And those six Eternal Realm God Realms were all a little dumbfounded, Ye Tian actually had to fight against so many demon seeds with his own strength?

But soon, they were dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian used the Ruin Sun Domain and the Ruin Sun Grip to pinch the weak demon seeds one by one, and then cast the Tianyan Peng Light Technique, shuttling between these demon seeds "two and one three", killing them one by one.

In a short period of time, all these demon seeds fell and died, and the corpses were all put away by Ye Tian.

At this time, the six Eternal Realm God Realm came back to their senses.

"Thank you Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

These Eternal Realm Divine Realms thanked one after another.

Although they didn't know Ye Tian, they still knew what Ye Tian's name was.

But they really didn't know that Ye Tian was so powerful, he easily killed more than twenty demon seeds, how terrifying was such a strength!

Even if it is placed in the Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Rank powerhouse, it is definitely the top existence.

As for whether it could be comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, they naturally didn't have such an idea.

"If your injuries are not serious, go to support other places, and I'll leave first!"

After speaking, Ye Tian left here.

And one of the six Eternal Realm God Realms was severely injured, so he was going back to heal, he couldn't deal with the demon seed.

The other five thought about it carefully, and were still ready to heal for a while before going to support.

......

Next, Ye Tian supported everywhere and killed a lot of demon seeds, but after a long time, the ten opportunities to use the empty card were used up.

Thereupon.

He immediately went to the Boundary Court Branch, first, to exchange battle points, and second, to receive a new Escape Card.

If you don't have a blank card, it's too difficult to support, after all, the Eternal Realm is too big and scattered to be supported.

Soon, he came to the Boundary Court Branch.

At this time, the formations of the Realm Court Branch had all been activated, and there were almost no Eternal Realm God Realms guarding here, because they had all gone to support.

However, in the Realm Court, there are still several Eternal Realm God Realm guards here in the Void Ancient Bell.

Ye Tian came here, took out the corpses of the demon seeds one by one, asked them to count them, and was still under the inspection of a special realm spirit in the Realm Court, and then gave an accurate battle score, which would be recorded in the system of the Realm Court Headquarters.

Soon.

Ye Tian's record points came out.

160,000

This record point shocked the Eternal Realm God Realm here, because there were too many battle points, but it was also because Ye Tian had killed a lot of demon seeds.

"I'm going to get a Void Card!"

Ye Tian applied.

Soon, an empty card fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Then, he left the Realm Division and continued to hunt the Demon Seed.

......

Time passed.

The slaughter between the Eternal Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss continues, but many Eternal Kingdom Alliances have suffered, one Eternal Realm has been destroyed, and countless living beings have fallen.

At this moment, the endless life is meaningless, and if you don't have enough strength, you can't survive the calamity here, unless you're lucky enough to not encounter the demon seed.

And Ye Tian had also killed a lot of demon seeds, if it weren't for his move, the loss of the realm would have been even more heavy.

this day.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would definitely not be an opponent.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian killed this Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level demon seed, although the other party's strength was weaker than him, but it was not much weaker.

Moreover, the other party also has an Eternal Demon Pillar in his hand.

Under the slaughter, the other party was constantly escaping, and Ye Tian had been chasing and killing.

The demon seed doesn't seem to care about the life and death of the demon seeds, so there are no demon seeds to rescue it, the main thing is that it is difficult to rescue, and the territory span is too large.

As a result, Ye Tian's other copy bodies kept rushing here, preparing to besiege this demon seed........

Soon after.

Ye Tian's several replica bodies finally surrounded him, and after some killing, he successfully surrounded and killed him, and obtained an Eternal Demon Pillar again.

"Yes, I've got another Eternal Pillar!"

Ye Tian smiled.

This time, he killed so many demon seeds, and obtained a lot of resources, including two Eternal Demon Pillars, and there are several things comparable to the Eternal Demon Seed, which can be said to be a great harvest.

Subsequently, one of his replica bodies sent these Eternal Pillars and other treasures back to the Endless Realm Alliance, lest the other replica bodies fall, and these treasures would be gone.

He knew very well that there was definitely an existence among the demon seeds that attacked this time that could easily kill him, so he couldn't be safe.

Otherwise, it's nothing to lose a copy body, but if the resource treasure is gone, then it's really gone.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian's copy body returned, and then he began to refine these Eternal Demon Pillars and continue to cultivate.

No matter what happens, he won't stop cultivating.

With more treasures such as the Eternal Demon Pillar, his Eternal Dao Seed refining speed will be faster.

"If I can refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, I can condense the third Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, but unfortunately it's too late!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But there was no way, he could only do his best to kill some more demon seeds 2.8.

Moreover, the victory or defeat of the war does not lie in the eternal realm, but in the realm of the gods.

If the Demon Seed Abyss is defeated on the side of the Realm God Realm, a large number of strong people will definitely be sent to support the Eternal Realm.

Therefore, the purpose of the Eternal Realm now is not to defeat the demon seeds here, but to block these demon seeds and persevere.

This is also the reason why many Eternal Realm God Realms are not very desperate, and they are all looking forward to the support of the Realm God Realm.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's face changed, one of his copy bodies discovered the existence of a demon seed not too far from here, and it was not a demon seed, but three demon seeds.

"These three demon seeds must be killed, if the Endless Realm Alliance is discovered and the news is passed on, it will not be a good thing!"

So, Ye Tian immediately went to kill the three-headed demon seed.
